key_findings: Win rate of 42.9% with 2.6:1 reward:risk ratio

7 trades over test period = 2.3 trades per month

recommendations: Optimized RSI(5) < 25 provides faster signals with higher conviction
EMA 5/15 crossover works well - avoid changing without re-optimization
15min timeframe provides better signal quality than 1min
Volume spike threshold of 1.0x effectively filters false signals
ML filter (Random Forest) improves win rate by filtering weak signals
